temperature.description: Minimum absolute temperature floor for critical/warning escalation, preventing over-escalation from tight hourly standard deviations.

co2.description: Minimum absolute CO2 floor for critical/warning escalation.

raw_smoke_value.description: Minimum absolute raw smoke value floor for critical/warning escalation.

energy_consumption.description: Minimum absolute energy consumption floor for strong risk escalation.

notes: This profile is built strictly from normal rows (expected_label == 'normal') to establish the normal baseline.
Warning and critical rows are excluded from baseline calculations and are reserved for validation/evaluation.
Rebuild this profile when the underlying CSV grows (e.g. to 48h, 72h, 30 days, or more).
